title: Plan and conduct field research
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and conduct field research demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Scope field research

pcs.text: Assess suitability of field research subject in relation to industry sector outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess suitability of field research subject in relation to industry sector outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess suitability of field research subject in relation to industry sector outcomes.

pcs.text: Identify and justify the purpose of field research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and justify the purpose of field research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and justify the purpose of field research.

pcs.text: Identify challenges and opportunities to formulate research questions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify challenges and opportunities to formulate research questions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify challenges and opportunities to formulate research questions.

pcs.text: Define and justify field research topic, question or hypothesis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and justify field research topic, question or hypothesis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and justify field research topic, question or hypothesis.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Scope field research

elements.title: Design field research methodology

pcs.text: Identify relevant information sources and review relevant and credible literature related to the research topic
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant information sources and review relevant and credible literature related to the research topic?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant information sources and review relevant and credible literature related to the research topic.

pcs.text: Develop field research plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop field research plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop field research plan.

pcs.text: Determine research methods for data collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine research methods for data collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine research methods for data collection.

pcs.text: Identify reference groups for field research according to research plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify reference groups for field research according to research plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify reference groups for field research according to research plan.

pcs.text: Locate field research sites according to design requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate field research sites according to design requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate field research sites according to design requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and incorporate site factors impacting research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and incorporate site factors impacting research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and incorporate site factors impacting research.

pcs.text: Create a budget for field research plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Create a budget for field research plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Create a budget for field research plan.

pcs.text: Identify and obtain approvals and permits required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and obtain approvals and permits required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and obtain approvals and permits required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Design field research methodology

elements.title: Prepare to conduct field research

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety hazards associated with the implementation of field research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety hazards associated with the implementation of field research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards associated with the implementation of field research.

pcs.text: Identify and document social and environmental implications associated with field research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document social and environmental implications associated with field research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document social and environmental implications associated with field research.

pcs.text: Identify resource requirements for implementing field research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify resource requirements for implementing field research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify resource requirements for implementing field research.

pcs.text: Confirm cost and availability of resources with suppliers, contractors and stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm cost and availability of resources with suppliers, contractors and stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm cost and availability of resources with suppliers, contractors and stakeholders.

pcs.text: Establish and prepare field work sites for implementation of research according to research plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and prepare field work sites for implementation of research according to research plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and prepare field work sites for implementation of research according to research plan.

pcs.text: Organise access to field research subjects at times and places suitable for data collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise access to field research subjects at times and places suitable for data collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise access to field research subjects at times and places suitable for data collection.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare to conduct field research

elements.title: Implement data collection methods

pcs.text: Undertake data collection during field research according to research design and chosen methodologies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake data collection during field research according to research design and chosen methodologies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake data collection during field research according to research design and chosen methodologies.

pcs.text: Monitor field research and compliance with research plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor field research and compliance with research plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor field research and compliance with research plan.

pcs.text: Record all research data accurately using the specifications of the research plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record all research data accurately using the specifications of the research plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record all research data accurately using the specifications of the research plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Implement data collection methods

elements.title: Assess practical application of research outcomes

pcs.text: Analyse research data according to research plan outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse research data according to research plan outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse research data according to research plan outcomes.

pcs.text: Create records of research data analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Create records of research data analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Create records of research data analysis.

pcs.text: Synthesise research findings and draw conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Synthesise research findings and draw conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Synthesise research findings and draw conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments.

pcs.text: Assess meaning of research outcomes for practical application, based on conclusions drawn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess meaning of research outcomes for practical application, based on conclusions drawn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess meaning of research outcomes for practical application, based on conclusions drawn.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Assess practical application of research outcomes

elements.title: Report field research findings

pcs.text: Determine desired actions from field research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine desired actions from field research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine desired actions from field research.

pcs.text: Determine target audience for field research reporting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine target audience for field research reporting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine target audience for field research reporting.

pcs.text: Draft research report and obtain feedback
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Draft research report and obtain feedback?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Draft research report and obtain feedback.

pcs.text: Publish and circulate field research report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Publish and circulate field research report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Publish and circulate field research report.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Report field research findings
